title: Fund Liquidity Pools
summary:
### Fund BZE Liquidity Pools

If this proposal passes, we will spend 3M BZE from the community pool to improve liquidity on BeeZee DEX.

#### Funds usage
- appx. 1,200,000 BZE will be paired with 2,000 USDC for BZE/USDC LP
- 250,000 BZE will be added to BZE/VDL LP and the resulted shares will be locked forever
- 250,000 BZE will be used for infrastructure costs
- 500,000 BZE will be paid to BZE Alpha Team for the 2,000 USDC contribution to BZE/USDC LP. The entire amount will be staked.
- The remaining amount (appx. 800,000 BZE) is a reserve of funds for immediate usage and will be used for the upcoming liquidity pools and monthly costs with the Community Team.
